evidence_quotes.quote: clear display of real-money costs for virtual currencies and loot boxes, as current practices often confuse or mislead players.
addictive mechanics being targeted to minors,
easy, oneclick cancellation of subscriptions or free trials that convert automatically.

paragraphs.text: As a game designer and consumer, I support the Digital Fairness Acts aims to promote fair and transparent digital design. I believe it is especially important to require clear display of real-money costs for virtual currencies and loot boxes, as current practices often confuse or mislead players. I am also concerned about addictive mechanics being targeted to minors, and I strongly support measures to ensure easy, oneclick cancellation of subscriptions or free trials that convert automatically. At the same time, I encourage proportionate rules that improve transparency without overburdening small indie developers. Finally, I recommend that the EU prioritize strong enforcement of existing consumer directives before layering new regulatory obligations.
